options.name: -l
options.description: Output list of visited assemblies to BinaryCompatReport.Assemblies.txt

options.name: -s
options.description: Recursive (visit specified directories recursively). Default is non-recursive.

options.name: -closure
options.description: Path to a root assembly of a closure (to report unused references).

options.name: -resolve
options.description: Additional directory to resolve reference assemblies from.

options.name: -p
options.description: Semicolon-separated file pattern(s) such as *.dll;*.exe.

options.name: -baseline
options.description: Optional, read <baseline.txt> instead of BinaryCompatReport.txt.

options.name: -out
options.description: Write report to <report.txt> instead of BinaryCompatReport.txt.

options.name: -baselineDirectory
options.description: Directory to resolve baselines in if the baseline is a relative path.

options.name: -reportDirectory
options.description: Directory to write report files to if -out: is a relative path.

options.name: -ignoreVersionMismatch
options.description: Do not report assembly version mismatches.

options.name: -ignoreFacade
options.description: Do not report facade assemblies.

options.name: -ignoreMissingAssemblies
options.description: Do not report missing or unresolved assemblies.

options.name: -ignoreMissingTypes
options.description: Do not report missing types.

options.name: -ignoreMissingMembers
options.description: Do not report missing members.

options.name: -ignoreInterfaces
options.description: Do not report missing interface implementations.

options.name: -ignoreUnreferenced
options.description: Do not report unreferenced assemblies when in closure mode.

options.name: -ignoreSourceVersions
options.description:
Strip source assembly versions before baseline comparison.
Useful when the same baseline is used across builds with different versions.

options.name: -ignoreExtraBaselineEntries
options.description: Entries in the baseline but not in the report are ignored.

options.name: -doNotResolveFromGAC
options.description: Do not resolve assemblies from GAC.

options.name: -doNotResolveFromNetCore
options.description: Do not resolve assemblies from .NET runtime directories.

options.name: -ivt
options.description: Report internal API surface area consumed via InternalsVisibleTo.

options.name: -embeddedInteropTypes
options.description: Report embedded interop types.

options.name: -intPtrCtors
options.description:
Report IntPtr constructors (Mono).
If any of the below three output options are specified, all other output is suppressed.
Use this to limit the output to only the information required.

options.name: -outputExpectedWarnings
options.description: Only output old warnings that were in the baseline but no longer observed (and nothing else).

options.name: -outputNewWarnings
options.description: Only output new warnings that weren't in the baseline and nothing else.

options.name: -outputSummary
options.description:
Output the summary comparing the report and the baseline.
@response.rsp              Response file containing additional command-line arguments, one per line.
Display help.

options.name: -ignoreVersionMismatch
options.description:
that should be ignored for version mismatch reporting. If there is a version mismatch that is covered
by A.exe.config, but not B.exe.config, you can suppress warnings about B.exe.config using:

options.name: -ignoreVersionMismatch
options.description:
There is a separate command for the tool to replicate binding redirects from an app.config file
to one or more other app.config files:
checkbinarycompat -replicateBindingRedirects <source.exe.config> <destination.exe.config>+
